# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: firewall-allow-ssh
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/$(ref.project.name)/global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "22"
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA
    description: "Allow SSH access - Review and restrict source IPs in production"

- name: firewall-allow-rdp
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/$(ref.project.name)/global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "3389"
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA
    description: "Allow RDP access - Review and restrict source IPs in production"

- name: firewall-allow-http
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/$(ref.project.name)/global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "80"
    targetTags:
    - http-server
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA
    description: "Allow HTTP traffic to instances with http-server tag"

- name: firewall-allow-https
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/$(ref.project.name)/global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "443"
    targetTags:
    - https-server
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA
    description: "Allow HTTPS traffic to instances with https-server tag"

- name: firewall-deny-all-ingress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/$(ref.project.name)/global/networks/default
    priority: 65534
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    denied:
    - IPProtocol: all
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA
    description: "Deny all other ingress traffic by default"

- name: firewall-allow-internal
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/$(ref.project.name)/global/networks/default
    priority: 900
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 10.128.0.0/9
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "0-65535"
    - IPProtocol: udp
      ports:
      - "0-65535"
    - IPProtocol: icmp
    description: "Allow internal VPC communication"

outputs:
- name: ssh-firewall-rule
  value: $(ref.firewall-allow-ssh.selfLink)
- name: rdp-firewall-rule
  value: $(ref.firewall-allow-rdp.selfLink)
- name: http-firewall-rule
  value: $(ref.firewall-allow-http.selfLink)
- name: https-firewall-rule
  value: $(ref.firewall-allow-https.selfLink)
